ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the simulation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the simulation belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation the data belongs to */,
  "clock_today" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "sw10to40" REAL /* SW values for the 10 to 40 range */,
  "sw40to80" REAL /* SW values for the 40 to 80 range */,
  "sw80to120" REAL /* SW values for the 80 to 120 range */,
  "sw120to160" REAL /* SW values for the 120 to 160 range */,
  "sw160to200" REAL /* SW values for the 160 to 200 range */,
  "sw200to240" REAL /* SW values for the 200 to 240 range */,
  "sw240to280" REAL /* SW values for the 240 to 280 range */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the simulation */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the simulation */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation during the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_filtered" TEXT /* Data filters applied during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "lead_researcher" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Short description of the project */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the project */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_lead_researcher FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_projects" (
  "researcher_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the researcher-project association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a researcher */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the researcher is associated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Short description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the result belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result from the analysis */,
  "result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Short description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the visualization is based on */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., graph, chart) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the quality metric belongs to */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric of the data */,
  "data_completeness" REAL /* Completeness metric of the data */,
  "data_consistency" REAL /* Consistency metric of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the metadata belongs to */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the metadata */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the metadata */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes related to the simulation */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new results, simulation update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the run belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation run */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation run */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Short description of the simulation run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_parameters" (
  "run_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run parameter */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_parameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES simulation_runs ("run_id")
)
